title: Computer Science Honours Project

prerequisites.text: BSc degree with a major in Computer Science from UCT. An overall pass for the coursework component of this degree.

outline: This course is the compulsory research project component of a Computer Science Honours degree. The research project comprises a large project run over the course of the year under academic supervision, with a final mini-dissertation and other project deliverables.
assessment: Not specified in handbook; forms part of the overall Honours degree assessment.
